world.name: Zork I: The Great Underground Empire
world.aesthetic_seed: a watercolor Great Underground Empire: white clapboard house at the wood's edge, lantern-lit stone passages, cold green river water, brass and dust and old imperial grandeur gone soft at the edges

darkness.text: It is pitch black. You are likely to be eaten by a grue.
darkness.hazard_text: Oh, no! You have walked into the slavering fangs of a lurking grue!

messages: You have died. The world goes quiet for a moment, and then you are among trees, with the smell of earth and the certainty that this has cost you.
You have died again. The forest takes you back without comment, though you sense its patience is not a compliment.
You have died once more. At this rate the forest floor will learn the shape of you.

voice.register: Dry, precise, unhurried; wit by understatement, never exclamation. Rooms are reported like a surveyor's notes with one flourish allowed. The world is old, imperial, and indifferent to you.
examples: You are standing in an open field west of a white house, with a boarded front door.
This is a forest, with trees in all directions. To the east, there appears to be sunlight.
A chasm runs southwest to northeast and the path follows it. You are on the south side.
parser_hints: smash/whack a foe means attack it with the carried weapon

do.text: The water level behind the dam falls away with a long, diminishing sigh; the reservoir gives up its bed.
The water climbs back up its old marks behind the dam; the reservoir remembers itself.
The water reaches the ceiling pipes. The maintenance room is a maintenance pond now.

thief.arrive_text: A seedy-looking gentleman with a large bag slips in, giving you a nod that manages to be both courteous and appraising.
thief.leave_text: The seedy-looking gentleman ducks away into the dark, bag first.
thief.steal_room_text: A quick shadow crosses the room; something that was there is not.
thief.steal_text: You feel a light finger's touch at your satchel, and a moment later the seedy-looking gentleman is elsewhere and slightly richer.

swordglow.bright_text: Your sword has begun to glow very brightly.
swordglow.faint_text: Your sword is glowing with a faint blue glow.
swordglow.dim_text: Your sword is no longer glowing.

river.carry_text: The current takes the little boat and carries it on downriver.

do.name: ancient map
do.seed: a parchment map of the land surrounding the white house, marked with one path that was never there before

do.text: Inside the trophy case, where there was nothing left to want, an ancient parchment map has quietly appeared.
A hollow voice says "Fool."
A hollow voice says "Fool."
At your service!
Nothing happens here.
Wheeeeeeeeee!!!!!
Time passes.
If you pray enough, your prayers may be answered.
echo ... echo ... echo
Nothing happens.
The ground here is too hard for digging.
You have lost count already.

light.description: Set something alight or switch it on.

extinguish.description: Put a light or flame out.

push.fail_text: Pushing it has no visible effect.

turn.description: Turn a mechanism, usually with a tool.

unlock.description: Unlock a lock with a key.
unlock.fail_text: It has no lock you can see.

lock.description: Lock a lock with a key.
lock.fail_text: It has no lock you can see.

dig.description: Dig, given something to dig with.
dig.fail_text: The ground here is too hard for digging.

deflate.description: Let the air out of something.

plug.fail_text: There's nothing to plug it with.

wind.fail_text: It has no winding to it.

raise.description: Raise something on a rope or pulley.

lower.description: Lower something on a rope or pulley.

eat.fail_text: It is not the eating kind.

pray.fail_text: If you pray enough, your prayers may be answered.

xyzzy.description: An old word from another cave.

plugh.description: Another old word from another cave.

odysseus.description: Invoke the name of an old hero.

rooms.title: West of House
rooms.seed: a white clapboard house at the edge of a field, boarded front door, long grass, late watercolor light
rooms.description: You are standing in an open field west of a white house, with a boarded front door. The grass has grown long and gone to seed, and nobody has minded in years.

east.text: The door is boarded and you can't remove the boards.

rooms.title: North of House
rooms.seed: the shaded north face of a white house, boarded windows, a path into dark firs
rooms.description: You are facing the north side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded up. To the north a narrow path winds through the trees.

rooms.title: South of House
rooms.seed: the south face of a white house, boarded windows, brambles at the sill
rooms.description: You are facing the south side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded.

rooms.title: Behind House
rooms.seed: the back of a white house, one small window ajar, a kitchen garden gone wild
rooms.description: You are behind the white house. A path leads into the forest to the east, and in one corner of the house a small window stands slightly ajar.

rooms.title: Forest
rooms.seed: deep fir forest, needled floor, low green light, no path
rooms.description: This is a forest, with trees in all directions. To the east, there appears to be sunlight.

up.text: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.

west.text: You would need a machete to go further west.

rooms.title: Forest
rooms.seed: dim northern forest thickening toward mountains, wind high in the crowns
rooms.description: This is a dimly lit forest, with large trees all around.

up.text: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.

north.text: The forest becomes impenetrable to the north.

rooms.title: Forest
rooms.seed: southern forest, storm-leaned trunks, undergrowth ranked and rude
rooms.description: This is a dimly lit forest, with large trees all around. The undergrowth south of here has settled the question of passage in its own favor.

up.text: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.

east.text: The rank undergrowth prevents eastward movement.

rooms.title: Forest
rooms.seed: forest edge failing against a wall of impassable grey mountains
rooms.description: The forest thins out here, revealing impassable mountains to the east.

rooms.title: Forest Path
rooms.seed: a winding north-south path under one very large low-branched tree
rooms.description: This is a path winding through a dimly lit forest. The path heads north-south here. One particularly large tree with some low branches stands at the edge of the path.

rooms.title: Up a Tree
rooms.seed: ten feet up a broad-limbed tree, a bird's nest on the branch, forest floor below
rooms.description: You are about ten feet up, nestled among the large lower branches. The next branch above is out of reach, and knows it.

rooms.title: Clearing
rooms.seed: a small forest clearing carpeted in dead leaves, something metallic beneath
rooms.description: You are in a clearing, with a forest surrounding you on all sides. A path leads south.

north.text: The forest becomes impenetrable to the north.

do.text: The clearing is carpeted with dead leaves, drifted deep.

rooms.title: Clearing
rooms.seed: an eastern clearing where the forest gives out toward a canyon rim
rooms.description: You are in a small clearing in a well marked forest path that extends to the east and west.

up.text: There is no tree here suitable for climbing.

rooms.title: Canyon View
rooms.seed: the top of the Great Canyon, river glinting far below, Aragain Falls upriver, a climbable rock wall
rooms.description: You are at the top of the Great Canyon on its west wall, and the view is the reward: the Frigid River silvering below, the White Cliffs shouldering into the Flathead Mountains across the gorge, and upstream to the north, Aragain Falls wearing its rainbow. The wall here looks climbable, for the confident.

rooms.title: Rocky Ledge
rooms.seed: a ledge halfway down the canyon wall, wide enough to rest, wall climbable both ways
rooms.description: You are on a ledge about halfway up the canyon wall, wide enough to stand on and think better of things. The main flow of Aragain Falls twists through a passage no one could enter and survive. The cliff continues up, and down.

rooms.title: Canyon Bottom
rooms.seed: the canyon floor beneath high walls, the river wide and quick, spray drifting
rooms.description: You are on the canyon floor beneath walls that may be climbable, next to the lesser runoff of Aragain Falls. Spray keeps the stones dark. A narrow path leads north.

rooms.title: End of Rainbow
rooms.seed: a small rocky beach at the base of Aragain Falls, the rainbow's western foot ending here in spray
rooms.description: You are on a small rocky beach past the falls, walled on the south by the canyon. The rainbow of Aragain Falls comes down to end here, which is the kind of thing one accepts locally.

up.blocked_text: Rainbows are lovely, but they are not stairs.

northeast.blocked_text: Rainbows are lovely, but they are not stairs.

east.blocked_text: Rainbows are lovely, but they are not stairs.

rooms.title: Stone Barrow
rooms.seed: a massive barrow of rough grey stone, a huge stone door standing open on darkness
rooms.description: You are standing in front of a massive barrow of stone. In the east face is a huge stone door which is open. You cannot see into the dark of the tomb.

do.text: Inside the barrow, the dark is not empty: it is expectant. Somewhere below, the Great Underground Empire keeps a place for the one who gathered all its scattered brightness. Your adventure here is done, and well done.
You have won, with a perfect score. The Great Underground Empire will speak of you in its sleep.

rooms.title: Kitchen
rooms.seed: a farmhouse kitchen, table lately used, dark chimney mouth, stairs going up into gloom
rooms.description: You are in the kitchen of the white house. A table seems to have been used recently for the preparation of food. A passage leads to the west and a dark staircase can be seen leading upward. A dark chimney leads down and to the east is a small window which is open.

down.text: Only Santa Claus climbs down chimneys.

rooms.title: Living Room
rooms.seed: a comfortable ruin of a parlor: oriental rug, trophy case, a sword over the mantel, a door nailed shut
rooms.description: You are in the living room. There is a doorway to the east, a wooden door with strange gothic lettering to the west, which appears to be nailed shut, a trophy case, and a large oriental rug in the center of the room.

down.blocked_text: You can't go that way, at present.

rooms.title: Attic
rooms.seed: a steep-raftered attic, one square of lesser dark for a window, dust in ropes of light when lit
rooms.description: This is the attic. The only exit is a stairway leading down.

rooms.title: Cellar
rooms.seed: a stone-flagged cellar, rickety stairs behind, a steep metal ramp to the west, passages north and south
rooms.description: You are in a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading north, and a crawlway to the south. On the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.

up.blocked_text: The trap door is closed and, by the sound of it, barred.

west.text: You try to ascend the ramp, but it is impossible, and you slide back down.

do.text: The trap door crashes shut, and you hear someone barring it.

rooms.title: The Troll Room
rooms.seed: a small square room, walls scarred by old blades, an axe-worn floor
rooms.description: This is a small room with passages to the east and south and a forbidding hole leading west. Bloodstains and deep scratches (perhaps made by an axe) mar the walls.

east.blocked_text: The troll fends you off with a menacing gesture.

west.blocked_text: The troll fends you off with a menacing gesture.

rooms.title: East of Chasm
rooms.seed: the lip of a great chasm falling away to the south, a path skirting east
rooms.description: You are on the east edge of a chasm, the bottom of which cannot be seen. A narrow passage goes north, and the path you are on continues to the east.

down.text: The chasm probably leads straight to the infernal regions.

rooms.title: Gallery
rooms.seed: an art gallery of the old empire, most frames looted empty, one painting left glowing in lamplight
rooms.description: This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.

rooms.title: Studio
rooms.seed: a paint-spattered studio, brushes gone stiff, a dark chimney mouth in the north wall
rooms.description: This appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the north end of the room is an open door (also covered with paint). A dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace; although you might be able to get up it, it seems unlikely you could get back down.

up.blocked_text: You can't get up there with what you're carrying.

on_traverse.text: You squirm up the chimney, gathering soot as you go, and emerge in the fireplace.

rooms.title: East-West Passage
rooms.seed: a broad rock-hewn passage running east to west, a chasm gaping north
rooms.description: This is a narrow east-west passageway. There is a narrow stairway leading down at the north end of the room.

rooms.title: Round Room
rooms.seed: a circular stone chamber where five ways meet, every footstep multiplied
rooms.description: This is a circular stone room with passages in all directions. Several of them have unfortunately been blocked by cave-ins.

rooms.title: Narrow Passage
rooms.seed: a shoulder-tight north-south passage of cold stone
rooms.description: This is a long and narrow corridor where a long north-south passageway briefly narrows even further.

rooms.title: Mirror Room
rooms.seed: a room dominated by one enormous flawless mirror, lit by its own pale reflection
rooms.description: You are in a large square room with tall ceilings. On the south wall is an enormous mirror which fills the entire wall. There are exits on the other three sides of the room.

rooms.title: Winding Passage
rooms.seed: a passage that winds like a thought that will not finish
rooms.description: This is a winding passage. It seems that there are only exits on the east and north.

rooms.title: Cave
rooms.seed: a tiny cave, more interval than room, a cold draft rising from below
rooms.description: This is a tiny cave with entrances west and north, and a dark, forbidding staircase leading down.

rooms.title: Entrance to Hades
rooms.seed: a cavern mouth lit by no visible flame, gates of black iron, a congregation of spirits barring the way
rooms.description:
You are outside a large gateway, on which is inscribed:

  Abandon every hope all ye who enter here!

The gate is open; through it you can see a desolation, with a pile of mangled bodies in one corner. Thousands of voices, lamenting some hideous fate, can be heard. The way through the gate is barred by evil spirits, who jeer at your attempts to pass.

in.blocked_text: Some invisible force prevents you from passing through the gate.

south.blocked_text: Some invisible force prevents you from passing through the gate.

rooms.title: Land of the Dead
rooms.seed: a wide grey shore of the underworld, quiet now, one crystal gleam among the cairns
rooms.description: You have entered the Land of the Living Dead. Thousands of lost souls can be heard weeping and moaning. In the corner are stacked the remains of dozens of previous adventurers less fortunate than you. A passage exits to the north.

rooms.title: Engravings Cave
rooms.seed: a low cave whose walls carry old engravings, inscrutable and proud
rooms.description: You have entered a low cave with passages leading northwest and east. There are old engravings on the walls here, of unsurpassing insight into the mind of the long-dead engraver, none of it transferable.

rooms.title: Dome Room
rooms.seed: the top of a great stone dome, a wooden railing at the rim, the torch room far below
rooms.description: You are at the periphery of a large dome, which forms the ceiling of another room below. Protecting you from a precipitous drop is a wooden railing which circles the dome.

down.blocked_text: You cannot go down without fracturing many bones.

on_traverse.text: You climb down the rope, hand over hand, and drop the last foot to the floor of the torch room.

rooms.title: Torch Room
rooms.seed: a domed chamber lit by one ivory torch on a white marble pedestal
rooms.description: This is a large room with a prominent doorway leading to a down staircase. Above you is a large dome. Up around the edge of the dome (20 feet up) is a wooden railing. In the center of the room sits a white marble pedestal.

rooms.title: Temple
rooms.seed: a temple of the old faith, brasswork gone green, a bell hung in its frame
rooms.description: This is the north end of a large temple. On the east wall is an ancient inscription, probably a prayer in a long-forgotten language. Below the prayer is a staircase leading down. The temple's north wall is solid granite. The entrance is through a huge marble arch to the south.

rooms.title: Altar
rooms.seed: the south end of the temple, a broad marble altar, two candle stubs burning
rooms.description: This is the south end of a large temple. In front of you is what appears to be an altar. In one corner is a small hole in the floor which leads into darkness. You probably could not get back up it.

down.blocked_text: You haven't a prayer of getting the coffin down there.

do.text: The air shimmers with something that is not quite approval, and the temple lets you go.

rooms.title: Egyptian Room
rooms.seed: a chamber done in the style of old Egypt, wall paintings of ibis and eye, a gold coffin on a plinth
rooms.description: This is a room which looks like an Egyptian tomb. There is an ascending staircase to the west.

rooms.title: Dam
rooms.seed: the crest of a great stone dam, control panel with one large bolt and a green bubble, water on one side and a long drop on the other
rooms.description: You stand atop Flood Control Dam #3, once a wonder of imperial engineering and still a competent wall. A control panel juts from the stone, dominated by a large metal bolt with a small green plastic bubble mounted above it. The reservoir side lies west; the river resumes, thinner and disappointed, far below to the east. The dam's lobby stands north, and a path follows the canyon rim south.

rooms.title: Dam Lobby
rooms.seed: a dusty visitor lobby with faded tour notices, a dispenser of matchbooks, imperial optimism gone stale
rooms.description: This room appears to have been the waiting room for groups touring the dam. Faded notices on the walls announce tours that no longer run and refreshments that no longer exist. Doorways lead south onto the dam itself, and north and east into the works.

north.blocked_text: The maintenance room is full of water and quite firm about it.

east.blocked_text: The maintenance room is full of water and quite firm about it.

rooms.title: Maintenance Room
rooms.seed: a cramped maintenance room, four colored buttons on a panel, tool chests, pipes climbing every wall
rooms.description: This is what was once the maintenance room for Flood Control Dam #3, and it has not been maintained. A panel on one wall carries a row of colored buttons: blue, yellow, brown, red. Below it stands a group of tool chests, and pipes climb every wall like ivy that gave up on being decorative.

rooms.title: Dam Base
rooms.seed: the stony base of the great dam, the Frigid River gathering itself below, spray on old stone
rooms.description: You are at the base of Flood Control Dam #3, which looms above you to the north like a decision already made. The Frigid River gathers itself back together here and sets off south with somewhere to be.

launch.blocked_text: You have nothing under you fit to launch.

rooms.title: Reservoir South
rooms.seed: a long stony southern shore of the reservoir, water line written on every rock
rooms.description: This is a long strip of shore along the reservoir's southern edge, where every stone carries the water line of better-supervised days. A stream bed lies west, the dam east, and passages wind away southeast and southwest.

rooms.title: Reservoir
rooms.seed: the broad basin of the reservoir, silt and stranded weed between two shores
rooms.description: This is the reservoir of Flood Control Dam #3, a broad basin between shores north and south. What the water chooses to do here depends entirely on the dam.

up.blocked_text: The stream is too swift for swimming.

west.blocked_text: The stream is too swift for swimming.

rooms.title: Reservoir North
rooms.seed: the reservoir's northern shore, stones with long underwater careers, a passage north into rock
rooms.description: This is the reservoir's north shore, a margin of stones that have all been underwater at some point in their careers. A passage leads north into the rock.

rooms.title: Stream View
rooms.seed: the mouth of a small stream giving itself up to the reservoir, a gap in the rock too small to enter
rooms.description: You are standing at the mouth of a small stream where it gives up and joins the reservoir. The water comes out of a gap in the rock too small for anything with shoulders.

west.text: The stream emerges from a spot too small for you to enter.

rooms.title: Stream
rooms.seed: a narrow stone-walled stream channel, current patient and unanimous, flowing toward the reservoir
rooms.description: You are on a narrow stream walled in smooth stone, flowing down toward the reservoir. The current is patient but unanimous.

rooms.title: Deep Canyon
rooms.seed: the rim of a deep stone canyon, a rough stairway descending into the dark
rooms.description: You are on the rim of a deep canyon whose bottom is a matter of faith. Passages lead northwest, east, and southwest, and a rough stairway descends into the dark below.

rooms.title: Loud Room
rooms.seed: a tall stone chamber where every surface has an opinion about sound, a platinum gleam on the floor
rooms.description: This is a large room with a ceiling too high to trouble a torch. A narrow passage runs east to west, and a stone stairway climbs up. Every surface here has an opinion about sound.

do.text: The roar in here is a physical fact: water hammering through the dam somewhere in the rock, every wall repeating it at full volume. Your head refuses the assignment, and your legs carry you out before you are consulted.
The room is deafeningly loud with an undetermined rushing sound, which the walls take up and hand back until it is difficult even to think.
The room is deafeningly loud with an undetermined rushing sound, which the walls take up and hand back until it is difficult even to think.
The acoustics of the room change subtly.
The acoustics of the room change subtly.

rooms.title: North-South Passage
rooms.seed: a high squared north-south passage cut by tools a thousand years gone
rooms.description: This is a high north-south passage, its walls squared by tools nobody has made for a thousand years. Side exits lead north and northeast.

rooms.title: Chasm
rooms.seed: a great chasm splitting the rock southwest to northeast, path clinging to the south edge
rooms.description: A great chasm splits the rock here, running away southwest to northeast. The path picks its way along the south edge; a climbable slope leads up to the southwest, and passages continue northeast and south.

down.text: The chasm has a bottom, but you would meet it all at once.

rooms.title: Damp Cave
rooms.seed: a cave wet in the committed way of places never once dry, passage running east and west
rooms.description: This cave is wet in the committed way of places that have never once been dry. The passage runs east and west; to the south, the ceiling and floor lose interest in staying apart.

south.text: It narrows to a crack that even the insects treat as a formality.

rooms.title: Cold Passage
rooms.seed: a cold damp corridor where the air moves with somewhere to be
rooms.description: This is a cold and damp corridor where the air moves past you with somewhere to be. The chill is not personal. Ways lead south and west.

rooms.title: Mirror Room
rooms.seed: a room dominated by one enormous flawless mirror, dark and cold, indistinguishable from its twin
rooms.description: You are in a large square room with tall ceilings. On the south wall is an enormous mirror which fills the entire wall. There are exits on the other three sides of the room.

rooms.title: Cave
rooms.seed: a small cave, hardly more than a widening of the rock, stairway leading down
rooms.description: This is a small cave, hardly more than a widening of the rock, with an entrance to the north, a way west, and a stairway leading down.

rooms.title: Twisting Passage
rooms.seed: a passage that winds and unwinds without committing to a direction
rooms.description: This passage winds and unwinds without ever committing to a direction. Openings lead north and east.

rooms.title: Atlantis Room
rooms.seed: an ancient room long under water in its day, crusted salt line on the walls, a crystal trident gleaming
rooms.description: This is an ancient room, long under water in its day, with exits up and south. The walls carry the crusted salt line of an old sea, and the air still tastes faintly of fish and empire.

rooms.title: Slide Room
rooms.seed: a small chamber with the top of a steep metal slide polished bright, a low tunnel north
rooms.description: This is a small chamber, in one wall of which stands the top of a steep metal slide, polished bright by use it no longer gets. A passage leads east, and a low tunnel goes north.

on_traverse.text: You sit down on the slide out of respect for physics, and physics takes it from there. The cellar receives you at speed.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

rooms.title: Unfinished Dark
rooms.seed: unfinished dark
rooms.description: This part of the empire is still being excavated.

toons.name: Adventurer
toons.appearance_seed: a traveler in sensible boots, carrying nothing yet and eyeing the mailbox
toons.seed: the nameless adventurer every empire eventually gets

toons.name: troll
toons.appearance_seed: a pungent troll, all knuckle and appetite, holding a bloody axe
toons.seed: a nasty-looking troll brandishing a bloody axe, doorkeeper by trade and temperament
toons.presence_text: A nasty-looking troll, brandishing a bloody axe, blocks all passages out of the room.

hit_texts: The troll staggers back from a solid blow, more surprised than hurt, then more hurt than surprised.
Your blade bites; the troll's grip on his axe loosens a little.
miss_texts: The troll swats your blade aside with the flat of his axe.
You swing wide; the troll grins, which is worse than the axe.
combat.death_text: Almost as soon as the troll breathes his last breath, a cloud of sinister black fog envelops him, and when the fog lifts, the carcass has disappeared.
counter_texts: The axe sweeps past as you jump aside.
The troll's axe barely misses your ear.
The axe crashes against the rock, throwing sparks!

things.name: small mailbox
things.seed: a small mailbox on a weathered post

properties.open_text: Opening the small mailbox reveals a leaflet.

things.name: leaflet
things.seed: a single printed leaflet, folded once
things.text:
WELCOME TO ZORK!

ZORK is a game of adventure, danger, and low cunning. In it you will find towers of treasure and a great many ways to stop needing it. No map here is honest, no lock is idle, and the management accepts no liability.

things.name: welcome mat
things.seed: a rubber mat saying 'Welcome to Zork!', frayed at one corner

things.name: bird's nest
things.seed: a small bird's nest woven of twigs and horsehair

things.name: jewel-encrusted egg
things.seed: an egg cased in fine gold filigree and set with jewels, its clasp too delicate for field surgery

state_text.clasped: Its clasp is shut, and the mechanism is beyond you.
state_text.open: It stands open on its hinge, the golden clockwork canary's cradle within revealed as the masterwork it is.

properties.locked_text: You have neither the tools nor the delicacy; forcing it would ruin something irreplaceable.

do.text: The clasp is cunning past your skill. Perhaps a specialist — someone with delicate fingers and flexible ethics — could open it without ruin.

things.name: pile of leaves
things.seed: a deep drift of dead leaves, suspiciously tidy at the center of the clearing

do.text: There are 69,105 leaves here.
In disturbing the pile of leaves, a grating is revealed.
You rearrange the leaves. The grating remains revealed.
You pick up the pile of leaves, which was heavier than it looked; beneath it, a grating is revealed.

things.name: grating
things.seed: an iron grating set flush in the earth, locked from beneath

do.text: You see nothing here to open.
The grating opens to reveal darkness below.
The grating is already open.
The grating is locked.
The lock faces the other side; you can't reach it from up here.

things.name: kitchen window
things.seed: a small window at the back of the house, ajar by a finger's width

do.text: With great effort, you open the window far enough to allow entry.
The window is already open.
The window closes, not without protest.
The window is already closed as far as it goes.

things.name: golden clockwork canary
things.seed: a golden clockwork canary, feathers of hammered gold leaf, a winding stem under one wing

do.text: The canary chirps, slightly off-key, an aria from a forgotten opera. From out of the greenery flies a lovely songbird; it perches on a limb just over your head, opens its beak, and a beautiful brass bauble drops from its mouth, bounces off the top of your head, and lands glimmering in the grass. As the canary winds down, the songbird flies away.

do.name: beautiful brass bauble
do.seed: a small brass bauble, polished by a songbird's fussing

do.text: The canary chirps blithely, if somewhat tinnily, for a short time.
You aren't holding the canary.

things.name: kitchen table
things.seed: a sturdy kitchen table, crumbs and knife-marks

things.name: brown sack
things.seed: a brown paper sack smelling faintly of hot peppers

properties.open_text: Opening the brown sack reveals a lunch, and a clove of garlic.

things.name: lunch
things.seed: a hot pepper sandwich past its best hour

do.text: Thank you very much. It really hit the spot.
You aren't holding it.

things.name: clove of garlic
things.seed: a papery clove of garlic, pungent enough to have opinions

do.text: What the heck! You won't make friends this way, but nobody around here is too friendly anyhow. Gulp!
You aren't holding it.

things.name: glass bottle
things.seed: a glass bottle, stoppered, water inside catching the light

properties.open_text: You pull the stopper from the bottle.

things.name: quantity of water
things.seed: clear water, cold as a well

do.text: Thank you very much. I was rather thirsty (from all this talking, probably).
The bottle is closed; the water, for now, is a rumor.

things.name: trophy case
things.seed: a tall trophy case of dark wood and glass, empty and patient

properties.open_text: You swing the glass door of the trophy case open.

things.name: brass lantern
things.seed: a battery-powered brass lantern, dented, dependable, finite

fuel_warnings.30: The lamp appears a bit dimmer.
fuel_warnings.20: The lamp is definitely dimmer now.

properties.burnout_text: You'd better have more light than from the brass lantern. It has gone out for good.

do.text: A burned-out lamp won't light.
It is already on.
The brass lantern is now on.
The brass lantern is now off.
It is already off.

things.name: oriental rug
things.seed: a large oriental rug, extremely heavy, lying suspiciously flat

do.text: With a great effort, the rug is moved to one side of the room, revealing the dusty cover of a closed trap door.
Having moved the rug once, you find it wants to stay moved.

things.name: trap door
things.seed: a square trap door set flush with the floorboards, its ring-pull dark with age

do.text: You see nothing here like that to open.
The trap door is already open.
The door reluctantly opens to reveal a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
The trap door swings shut.
It is already closed.

things.name: elvish sword
things.seed: an elvish sword of great antiquity, runes down the blade, a faint readiness about it

things.name: newspaper
things.seed: a yellowed newspaper: US NEWS & DUNGEON REPORT
things.text: US NEWS & DUNGEON REPORT, late edition. The lead story concerns the continued absence of the Lord of the Great Underground Empire, and speculates, at length and without evidence, about the treasure said to remain below. The classifieds seek a fearless adventurer; terms negotiable; survivors preferred.

things.name: nasty knife
things.seed: a nasty-looking knife on a squat table, honest about its intentions

things.name: coil of rope
things.seed: a large coil of rope, dusty but sound

do.text: The rope drops over the side and comes within ten feet of the floor below.
The rope is already tied to the railing.
You can't tie the rope to that.
The rope is tied fast to the railing; it declines to come along.
The rope is now untied.
It isn't tied to anything.

things.name: bloody axe
things.seed: a heavy axe, its edge dark with old arguments

things.name: painting
things.seed: a painting of unparalleled beauty, somehow overlooked by the vandals

things.name: wooden railing
things.seed: a stout wooden railing circling the dome's rim

things.name: ivory torch
things.seed: an ivory torch burning with a flame that has never once flickered

do.text: You nearly burn your hand trying to extinguish the flame.

things.name: marble pedestal
things.seed: a white marble pedestal, torch-scorched at the crown

things.name: brass bell
things.seed: a small brass bell, temple-green with age

state_text.red-hot: It is glowing an angry red, far too hot to hold.

do.text: The bell suddenly becomes red hot and falls to the ground. The wraiths, as if paralyzed, stop their jeering and slowly turn to face you. On their ashen faces, the expression of a long-forgotten terror takes shape.
The bell is too hot to touch, let alone ring.
Ding, dong.

things.name: pair of candles
things.seed: a pair of altar candles, out cold, wax pooled at their feet

fuel_warnings.5: The candles are becoming quite short.

properties.burnout_text: The candles gutter and go out for the last time.

do.text: The candles catch. The flames flicker low, as though scared, and the spirits shrink back from their light. Somewhere a voice that has not spoken in centuries clears its throat.
The candles are already lit.
The candles are lit.
There is not enough left of the candles to light.
You have nothing lit to light them with.
The flames are extinguished.
The candles are not lit.

things.name: black book
things.seed: a large black book, its cover worn smooth by centuries of reluctant hands
things.text: Commandment #12592: Oh ye who go about saying unto each other, 'Hello sailor': Dost thou know the magnitude of thy sin before the gods? Verily, thou shalt be ground between two stones. Shall the angry gods cast thy body into the whirlpool? Surely, thy eye shall be put out with a sharp stick! Even unto the ends of the earth shalt thou wander and unto the land of the dead shalt thou be sent at last.

do.text: Each word of the prayer reverberates through the hall in a deafening confusion. As the last word fades, a voice, loud and commanding, speaks: "Begone, fiends!" A heart-stopping scream fills the cavern, and the spirits, sensing a greater power, flee through the walls.

things.name: gold coffin
things.seed: a solid gold coffin worked with the seal of an ancient king, absurdly heavy and worth it

properties.open_text: The gold coffin opens on hinges that remember their duty. Inside lies a sceptre, possibly that of ancient Egypt itself.

things.name: sceptre
things.seed: an ornamented sceptre tapering to a sharp point, of Egyptian workmanship

do.text: Suddenly, the rainbow appears to become solid and, I venture, walkable (I think the giveaway was the stairs and bannister).
Suddenly, the rainbow appears to become solid and, I venture, walkable (I think the giveaway was the stairs and bannister).
A dazzling display of colorful lights briefly emanates from the sceptre.
You aren't holding the sceptre.

things.name: crystal skull
things.seed: a crystal skull, cold to the touch, catching light that is not there

things.name: bolt
things.seed: a large metal bolt mounted dead center in the control panel

do.text: It is an integral part of the control panel.
The sluice gates open. Water pours through the dam.
The sluice gates close and water starts to collect behind the dam.
The bolt won't turn with your best effort.
The bolt won't turn using that.

things.name: green bubble
things.seed: a small green plastic bubble set above the bolt, dark or glowing by the dam's mood

do.text: It is an integral part of the control panel.
The green bubble is glowing serenely, which in the language of control panels means yes.
The green bubble is dark and unhelpful.

things.name: yellow button
things.seed: a yellow button worn smooth by official thumbs

do.text: Click.

things.name: brown button
things.seed: a brown button, purpose forgotten by everyone but the dam

do.text: Click.

things.name: blue button
things.seed: a blue button that has been waiting a long time to cause trouble

do.text: There is a rumble from within the wall, and a stream of water bursts from a pipe joint at the east side of the room. The dam has sprung a leak, and this room is where it keeps it.
The blue button appears to be jammed.

things.name: red button
things.seed: a red button connected, in the imperial style, to the lights

do.text: The lights within the room come on with a dazzling brilliance, as though showing off.
The lights within the room go out.

things.name: group of tool chests
things.seed: a group of tool chests, every one of them empty

properties.examined_text: Dozens of tool chests, and every one of them empty. The maintainers took their tools with them when they went, which says something about their faith in the dam.

do.text: The chests are so rusted to the floor that they and the floor are now one school of thought.

things.name: wrench
things.seed: a heavy adjustable wrench, jaws rusted to one width

things.name: screwdriver
things.seed: a flat-bladed screwdriver with a chewed wooden handle

things.name: tube
things.seed: a large tube like a toothpaste tube that has never met a tooth
things.text:
--> Frobozz Magic Gunk Company <--
          All-Purpose Gunk
Grip it. Glob it. Gunk it. Contents: one (1) application, viscous. The Frobozz Magic Gunk Company accepts no responsibility for the consequences of adhesion.

properties.open_text: The tube unscrews with a sigh of old air. Inside is a quantity of viscous material with clear ambitions to be elsewhere.

things.name: viscous material
things.seed: a wad of viscous material, gray and patient

things.name: leak
things.seed: a pipe joint on the east wall, weeping under pressure

do.text: By some miracle of Frobozz Magic adhesion, the viscous material clings, sets, and the leak surrenders.
The idea is right; the material is wrong.
The pipe joint is weeping quietly to itself, but it holds for now.

things.name: matchbook
things.seed: a matchbook whose cover advertises the dam it was abandoned in
things.text:
(Close cover before striking.)

VISIT BEAUTIFUL FLOOD CONTROL DAM #3 — wonder of the age, pride of the Empire. Tours daily. Refreshments formerly available. The management is not responsible for anything.

properties.burnout_text: The match burns down to your fingers and goes out.

do.text: One of the matches scratches to life. The flame is small and in a hurry.
The match is out.
No match is burning.

things.name: tour guidebook
things.seed: a stack of tour guidebooks, foxed at the corners, boastful throughout
things.text: "Flood Control Dam #3, admired yearly by thousands, was constructed in 783 GUE to harness the mighty Frigid River. The dam took 112 GUE-years to complete, consumed 370 million zorkmids, and is fitted with a control panel of advanced design. Visitors are asked not to touch the bolt. We hope you enjoy your visit, and remind you that the Empire's engineers thought of everything, whatever you may shortly observe."

things.name: platinum bar
things.seed: a bar of solid platinum, heavier than it looks, and it looks heavy

do.text: Your words come straight back at you from every wall — bar ... bar ... bar — until the room has argued you out of it.
Your words come straight back at you from every wall — bar ... bar ... bar — until the room has argued you out of it.

things.name: trunk of jewels
things.seed: an old trunk bursting with jewels that outlasted their owners

things.name: hand-held air pump
things.seed: a small hand-held air pump, factory-stamped and optimistic

things.name: crystal trident
things.seed: a crystal trident taller than a man's arm, cut for a god's hand

things.name: enormous mirror
things.seed: an enormous flawless mirror filling the wall, reflecting a room that might be this one

do.text: There is a rumble from deep within the earth and the room shakes, and when it settles you would swear the room is the same and everything beyond it is not.

things.name: enormous mirror
things.seed: an enormous flawless mirror filling the wall, reflecting a room that might be this one

do.text: There is a rumble from deep within the earth and the room shakes, and when it settles you would swear the room is the same and everything beyond it is not.

things.name: stub-boat
things.seed: a thing not yet made
